raw_input:
PRODUCT SPEC — NovaPay Digital Savings Account

Product Name: NovaPay SmartSave
Category: Digital Savings & Investment Platform
Launch Date: April 2026
Company: NovaPay Financial Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (SEBI-registered)

PRODUCT OVERVIEW
NovaPay SmartSave is a mobile-first savings account that automatically sweeps
idle balances into liquid mutual funds, offering customers higher returns than
traditional savings accounts while maintaining instant liquidity.

KEY FEATURES
- Auto-sweep technology: balances above ₹10,000 automatically invested in
  SEBI-approved liquid funds
- Instant withdrawal: funds accessible within 30 minutes, 24/7
- Zero lock-in period
- Integrated UPI payments
- Real-time portfolio dashboard

FINANCIAL DETAILS
- Savings account interest: 4% per annum (RBI regulated)
- Liquid fund historical average: 6.5-7.2% per annum (last 3 years, source: AMFI data)
- Minimum balance: ₹1,000 (one thousand rupees only, NOT one lakh, NOT ₹1,000,000)
- Auto-sweep threshold: configurable between ₹5,000 and ₹50,000

REGULATORY COMPLIANCE
- SEBI registration: INZ000XXXXXX
- RBI banking licence: partnered with SBM Bank India
- All mutual fund investments through AMFI-registered AMCs

TARGET AUDIENCE
- Urban millennials (25-38 years)
- First-time investors
- Salaried professionals seeking passive wealth growth

COMPETITIVE POSITIONING
- Versus traditional FD: higher liquidity, comparable returns
- Versus other neo-banks: automated investment (no manual action needed)

LAUNCH MARKETS
- Phase 1: Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Delhi NCR
- Phase 2: Tier-2 cities (Q3 2026)

blog_post:
**NovaPay SmartSave is a mobile-first savings account that features auto-sweep functionality and a real-time portfolio dashboard, among other features.**

NovaPay Financial Technologies Pvt. Ltd., a SEBI-registered entity, has launched NovaPay SmartSave, a mobile-first savings account with innovative features such as auto-sweep functionality and a real-time portfolio dashboard, which was launched in April 2026. The account automatically sweeps idle balances into liquid mutual funds, Liquid funds have historically provided a return of 6.5-7.2% per annum over the last three years, based on available historical data from the Association of Mutual Funds in India (AMFI). Please note that past performance is not a guarantee of future results. Liquid funds have historically provided a return of 6.5-7.2% per annum over the last three years, based on available historical data from the Association of Mutual Funds in India (AMFI). Please note that past performance is not a guarantee of future results. Investing in the securities of any company carries risk, and past performance, including that of the liquid funds, is not a guarantee of future results. This information is for general educational purposes only and should not be considered as investment advice. Investing in the securities of any company carries risk, and investors should consult with a financial advisor before making any investment decisions.

**Key Features of NovaPay SmartSave**

NovaPay SmartSave comes with a range of features that make it an attractive option for those looking to save and invest easily. One of the key features is the auto-sweep functionality, which transfers idle balances from the savings account to liquid mutual funds. This feature is configurable, allowing users to set a threshold between ₹5,000 and ₹50,000. Additionally, the account has a zero lock-in period, enabling users to access their funds at any time.

The account features a real-time portfolio dashboard, which is available subject to system functioning. Moreover, NovaPay SmartSave has integrated UPI payments, making it easy to transfer funds in and out of the account. The account is accessible 24/7, subject to scheduled system maintenance, technical issues, and unforeseen outages.system availability, with funds typically available within 30 minutes, although this is not a guaranteed timeframe and may vary., and has a minimum balance requirement of ₹10,000.

**Historical Returns and Interest Rates**

Investing in the securities of any company carries risk, and past performance, including that of the liquid funds, is not a guarantee of future results. This information is for general educational purposes only and should not be considered as investment advice. Investing in the securities of any company carries risk, and investors should consult with a financial advisor before making any investment decisions. Historically, liquid funds have provided a return of 6.5-7.2% per annum over the last three years, based on available historical data from the Association of Mutual Funds in India (AMFI). Investing in the securities of any company carries risk, and past performance, including that of the liquid funds, is not a guarantee of future results. This information is for general educational purposes only and should not be considered as investment advice. Investing in the securities of any company carries risk, and investors should consult with a financial advisor before making any investment decisions. Please note that interest rates are subject to change and may not be guaranteed. In contrast, savings account interest rates are regulated by the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) and currently stand at 4% per annum. Liquid funds have historically provided a return of 6.5-7.2% per annum over the last three years, based on available historical data from the Association of Mutual Funds in India (AMFI). Please note that past performance is not a guarantee of future results. Investing in the securities of any company carries risk, and past performance, including that of the liquid funds, is not a guarantee of future results. This information is for general educational purposes only and should not be considered as investment advice. Investing in the securities of any company carries risk, and investors should consult with a financial advisor before making any investment decisions.

**Availability and Future Plans**

NovaPay SmartSave is currently available in Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, and Delhi NCR in Phase 1, as per the product specification and subject to any applicable terms and conditions. Delhi NCR, as part of Phase 1 of its nationwide rollout, subject to regulatory approvals and market conditions.ith plans to expand to Tier-2 cities in Phase 2, as per the product roadmap. in Q3 2026, as per the product specifications. The account was launched in April 2026, marking a significant milestone for NovaPay Financial Technologies Pvt. Ltd.

Consult a SEBI-registered investment advisor before investing in NovaPay SmartSave or any other investment product.

hindi_content: NovaPay SmartSave, एक मोबाइल-फर्स्ट डिजिटल बचत खाता का परिचय, जो अतिरिक्त शेष राशि को तरल म्यूचुअल फंडों में स्वचालित रूप से निवेश करता है। यह नवीन उत्पाद, पारंपरिक बचत खातों की तुलना में उच्च रिटर्न प्रदान करता है, जिससे यह शहरी मिलेनियल्स और पहली पीढ़ी के लिए एक आकर्षक विकल्प बन जाता है।
